positive: An adorable, stylized portrait of a grumpy but charming corgi wearing a tiny wizard hat. Cartoon illustration style, Pixar-esque quality, warm pastel color palette, highly detailed fur texture, expressive eyes, digital painting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, scary, realistic, messy fur, poorly rendered paws, abstract
